name: Tangle
short: AI-native ERP for SMB manufacturers, with workflows, screens, reports, and production automation shaped around real operations.
full: Tangle is an AI-native ERP for small and mid-sized manufacturers that lets teams reshape workflows, screens, reports, and automations around their actual production process. Its value is flexible manufacturing operations rather than a generic ERP template: auditability, controlled workflow changes, traceable operations, custom dashboards, and ISO-style quality management expectations.

name: Rillet
short: AI-native finance ERP automating month-end close, revenue recognition, SaaS metrics, and audit-ready accounting workflows.
full: Rillet is an AI-native finance ERP for scaling companies that automates month-end close, revenue recognition, SaaS metrics, financial reporting, and controls directly from the general ledger. It is a strong reference for accounting workflows, permissions, audit trails, ERP integrations, SOC 1 controls, and SOC 2 security posture.

name: Fulcrum
short: Cloud manufacturing software for shop-floor scheduling, live production data, operator workflows, and paperless operations.
full: Fulcrum is cloud manufacturing software that connects shop-floor activity, scheduling, production tracking, job costing, inventory movement, and operator workflows in one live system. It is a strong reference for custom ERP, MRP, and MES projects where real-time operational data matters more than static reporting.

name: Tellescope
short: HIPAA-compliant digital health CRM and care workflow platform for patient communication and virtual care operations.
full: Tellescope is a unified digital health platform and HIPAA-compliant CRM for modern healthcare teams: patient communication, virtual care delivery, workflow automation, care coordination, and custom patient pathways. It is a strong reference for multi-tenant healthcare SaaS combining CRM, care workflows, tasks, messaging, and integrations.

name: CoverGo
short: AI and no-code insurance platform for product configuration, policy administration, claims automation, and insurer operations.
full: CoverGo is an AI and no-code insurance platform for health, life, and P&C insurers: configurable products, policy administration, claims workflows, distribution portals, APIs, and operational automation. Public security positioning includes ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 Type I compliance.

name: AI Insurance
short: AI-powered insurance management for underwriting, submissions intake, claims parsing, billing, and program operations.
full: AI Insurance is an all-in-one insurance management platform for MGAs, RRGs, TPAs, captives, and program managers. It maps well to underwriting, claims, submission processing, billing, bordereaux, document intake, permissions, and program operations. Compliance positioning includes HIPAA and SOC 2 Type 2.

name: Numeric
short: AI close automation platform unifying close management, reconciliation, reporting, and audit workflows.
full: Numeric is an AI close automation platform for accounting teams: close management, account reconciliation, reporting, cash visibility, review workflows, and finance controls. It is a clean reference for SaaS backend work involving approvals, audit readiness, ERP data sync, and accounting process automation.

name: Classe365
short: School management SaaS for admissions, SIS, academics, LMS, CRM, fees, and student lifecycle operations.
full: Classe365 is a school management SaaS covering admissions, SIS, academics, LMS, CRM, fees, student communication, parent engagement, and institutional operations. It is a useful education ERP reference where tenant isolation, FERPA, GDPR, COPPA, permissions, and lifecycle records matter.

name: Katana
short: Cloud inventory and manufacturing SaaS for real-time stock, production tracking, sales orders, and multi-location operations.
full: Katana is a cloud inventory and manufacturing platform for product businesses: real-time stock visibility, production tracking, sales order management, purchasing, outsourced production coordination, accounting integrations, and multi-location operations. It is a strong multi-tenant manufacturing SaaS reference.

name: Awell
short: Healthcare care-flow orchestration for designing, launching, and improving automated clinical workflows.
full: Awell is a healthcare care-flow orchestration platform that lets clinical, product, and operations teams design, launch, operate, and improve automated care flows using drag-and-drop tools or natural language AI prompts. It is a strong reference for HIPAA-aware healthcare operations, patient safety governance, auditability, and controlled deployment of workflows and AI agents.
